planned_changes: Update smoke_hvac_plan.xlsx: add an 'Inputs' sheet with named cells for pm25_outdoor_threshold, filter_merv_min, recirc_pct_max, hard_threshold_record_count, and decision_budget_usd. Ensure those named cells are used by formulas in Records/Checks sheets.

Add a 'Checks' (Formula map) sheet in smoke_hvac_plan.xlsx that lists the exact formulas and cell references used to compute outdoor_blocker, filter_blocker, recirc_blocker, blocker_count, needs_review, technical_score, and economic_proxy. Provide both formula text and example evaluated values.

Modify Records sheet and the Record-Level Rationale table so that safety-blocker records (needs_review = true) are explicitly excluded from any ROI/economic ranking. Remove or mark 'economic_rank' as 'N/A - safety blocker' for those records (e.g., R3). Update related formula logic to skip blockers when computing economic rankings.

Create a 'Cost assumptions' sheet containing provisional per-intervention cost estimates (or ranges) and implement workbook budget-adherence checks that compare mitigation totals to decision_budget_usd; add sensitivity scenario calculations for low/median/high cost assumptions.

Ensure the workbook contains no macros or external links and is saved in a format parseable by common libraries (Excel .xlsx with visible formulas). If the workbook is generated programmatically, include a 'Build notes' text file or commented sheet documenting generation steps and the script used.

Update facilities_memo.md: add explicit references to cell addresses/named cells for all per-record claims (e.g., 'See Inputs!B2' and 'Checks!C5'), document the change excluding blockers from ROI ranking, summarize cost assumptions and budget-check results, and include a small plain-text dump or screenshot of the key formula cells.

Correct any metadata/output contradictions: ensure summary fields (passed_criteria, failed_criteria) consistently mark ri_4 as failed until the above corrections are validated, and include a short note in the memo describing what was changed and why.

Re-run artifact preview/verification (or provide plain-text formula exports) and request re-grading. If possible, test workbook parsing with openpyxl/xlsxwriter locally before submission to confirm formula visibility.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Address rubric violation for economic ranking of safety-blocker records (ri_4), improve traceability and verifiability of the XLSX workbook by adding named input cells and a formula map, embed provisional cost assumptions and budget checks, and resolve internal metadata inconsistencies so graders can re-verify formula-driven logic.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Well-structured memo and present spreadsheet deliverables with clear methods and reproducible logic described. Main issues: (1) safety-blocker records (R3) appear in an economic ranking despite rubric requiring blockers override ROI, producing a ri_4 deduction; (2) the workbook could not be parsed in the preview environment (openpyxl unavailable), so formula-level verification is not currently possible; (3) some memo claims lack explicit cell/sheet citations for traceability. Overall score 0.865 with ri_4 as the failed item to address.
